name: Stir-Fried Shiitakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard the mushroom stems. Wipe mushrooms with a damp paper towel and slice them thin.
2. Heat a wok or skillet and add oil. Heat well.
3. Add garlic and stir-fry until golden, over low heat. Remove garlic with a slotted spoon and discard.
4. Add mushrooms and stir-fry over medium-high heat for 1 minute.
5. Add white wine and continue to stir until the mushrooms are crisply tender, about 1 minute more.
6. Stir in chopped parsley and season to taste with salt and pepper.
7. Makes 6 servings.
NOTE: You can prepare other mushrooms such as chanterelles, oyster or regular mushrooms this way.
Per serving: Calories 122; Fat 10g; No cholesterol; Sodium 361mg; Percent calories from fat 68%; Source: "Helen Nash's Lower-Fat Losher Kitchen" Dallas Morning News 12/4/96. Typos by Bobbie Beers.
